name: Cahaya Bali
signature: A candi bentar split gate rendered in two depth layers frames the cover, frangipani petals fall continuously across the whole page, a soft lagoon-light sweep glides over the cover and hero, gold Balinese carved-relief corners mark every card, a lotus blooms with rippling water rings as the divider between sections, a slow sunset-sky gradient drifts behind everything, and a maximized three-layer field of floating + parallaxed frangipani, lotus, and wave-ring motifs covers all 14 sections.
brief: Balinese resort-wedding aesthetic elevated to Four Seasons / Bvlgari Bali territory — teal lagoon and gold, layered temple-gate architecture, frangipani motif rendered as a living, falling element rather than a one-time effect. Includes the full standard section set (Susunan Acara with icons, Dress Code, Hashtag & Instagram, quick-nav, auto-scroll, per-section background photos, admin-controlled and independently togglable).
